channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Russell and Hamilton give Mercedes a 1-2 finish in Las Vegas
item.description: George Russell won the Formula 1 race Saturday night in the Las Vegas Grand Prix and his Mercedes teammate Lewis Hamilton was second.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Arnold, Robinson run for more than 100 yards as Oklahoma stuns No. 7 Alabama 24-3
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Xavier Robinson ran for career highs of 107 yards and two touchdowns, and Oklahoma stunned No. 7 Alabama 24-3 on Saturday night to become bowl eligible and deal a severe blow to the Crimson Tide's chances of receiving a College Football Playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Princely Umanmielen’s return to the Swamp ends with a loss and a police escort
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Princely Umanmielen's return to the Swamp ended with a police escort. Umanmielen, who spent three years at Florida before transferring to Ole Miss, left the stadium with a number of officers surrounding him. And the defensive end still tried to get at heckling fans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arizona State fans storm field with time on clock, causing lengthy delay; Sun Devils post last-second win
item.description: Arizona State fans stormed the field to celebrate a huge victory over Big 12 rival BYU, but there was still one second left on the clock.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Silver Bowl champs! McClymonds too much for Oakland in section title showdown
item.description: 2024 Oakland Section championship: McClymonds wins 15th consecutive Silver Bowl as Berell Staples throws for two touchdowns
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: After fans storm field early, No. 21 Arizona St stops Hail Mary try for 28-23 win over No. 14 BYU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Cam Skattebo was the workhorse once again for Arizona State, carrying the Sun Devils on his back by rushing for 147 yards and three touchdowns. His reward was a well-earned celebration with fans. Twice. Skattebo had another big game, Sam Leavitt threw for 247 yards and No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Man City routed 4-0 by Tottenham in fifth-straight defeat as crisis deepens for Pep Guardiola
item.description: It started as an evening of celebration for Manchester City. It ended with the four-time defending Premier League champion conceding four goals and falling to a fifth-straight loss in all competitions as it faces a deepening crisis in a season that is threatening to unravel.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose State volleyball gets first-round bye at MW Tournament; Spartans scheduled to open against team that refused to play them in regular season
item.description: The Spartans are set to face either Utah State or Boise State in the second round, are waiting to see if a Colorado judge will allow alleged transgender athlete to play.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Helm's 2 TD catches power No. 3 Texas over Kentucky 31-14 to keep Longhorns atop SEC
item.description: Quinn Ewers threw two first-half touchdown passes to Gunnar Helm to lead No. 3 Texas to a 31-14 win over Kentucky.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vertuno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: Max Verstappen cruised to a fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship Saturday night by finishing fifth in the Las Vegas Grand Prix.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Michigan football secures bowl eligibility in 44-point blowout over Northwestern on Senior Day
item.description: The Michigan Wolverines are bowl-eligible after blowing out the Northwestern Wildcats 50-6 on Senior Day.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Argentina's Racing wins its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1
item.description: ASUNCION, Paraguay (AP) — Gaston Martirena and Adrian Martinez scored first-half goals as Argentina's Racing won its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1 in the final on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michkov scores in overtime, Flyers rally to beat Blackhawks 3-2
item.description: Matvei Michkov scored a power-play goal in overtime as the Flyers overcame a two-goal deficit in the third period to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Conor McGregor lashes out on rape accuser in social media rant after being found liable for assault
item.description: A day after being found liable of assault during a sexual encounter, former UFC champion Conor McGregor called his a accuser a "vicious liar.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man City's statistics hit new low after Tottenham humiliation
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — The statistics just keep getting worse for Manchester City and Pep Guardiola. City’s Premier League title challenge took a major blow on Saturday after being thrashed 4-0 at home by Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jason Kelce to host new late-night show on ESPN
item.description: Adding to his podcast and "Monday Night Football" gigs, Jason Kelce announced he will be a late-night host on ESPN at the start of the new year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Shiffrin wins World Cup slalom and takes quest for her 100th victory to North America
item.description: GURGL, Austria (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin is taking the quest for her 100th career World Cup victory to North America.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Purdy, Bosa out for Green Bay matchup, Allen steps up as QB
item.description: (KRON) – San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan announced in a press conference Friday that quarterback Brock Purdy will be out for Sunday’s game against the Green Bay Packers. Purdy injured his right shoulder in last Sunday's loss to the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Crimson Cliffs pulls off miraculous comeback to win 4A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was simply one of the best, most dramatic games in Utah high school football championship game history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boston shuts out Utah Hockey Club, 1-0
item.description: BOSTON (ABC4 Sports) - For the fifth time this season, the Utah Hockey Club failed to score a single goal. Joonas Korpisalo made 21 saves for the Boston Bruins in a 1-0 win against the Utah Hockey Club at TD Garden on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bountiful beats Roy to win 5A state title, 42-35
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Last month, Bountiful handed Roy its only regular season loss of the year, 42-35. It was a repeat performance in the championship game Thursday at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bidding war set to begin for star right fielder Juan Soto
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- After meeting with Juan Soto, Yankees managing general partner Hal Steinbrenner is unsure of their chances of resigning the star right fielder. Steinbrenner added that it was a very honest back and forth and that it lasted a couple of hours.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Mike Evans trending towards playing against the Giants on Sunday
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are looking to get back on track after four straight losses against the Giants, who swapped starting quarterbacks after losing five in a row.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Alex Killorn helps the Ducks beat the Blackhawks 3-2 for their third straight win
item.description: Alex Killorn had a goal and an assist in the third period, and the Anaheim Ducks beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Tuesday night for their season-high third straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ticket renewals begin for 2025 Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg
item.description: Fans who purchased 3-Day grandstand tickets in 2024 can now renew their tickets for the Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Zach LaVine's 16 fourth-quarter points lead Bulls past Pistons 122-112
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 16 of his 25 points in the fourth quarter and the Chicago Bulls pulled away for a 122-112 win against the Detroit Pistons on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU still controls own destiny for Big 12 Championship
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is in a position it hasn't been in all season long -- trying to bounce back from a loss. The Cougars suffered their first defeat of the season Saturday night, a disappointing 17-13 loss to Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trump dance takes over sports world
item.description: Supporters of President-elect Donald Trump have been paying homage on the gridiron and inside the octagon in recent days.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: First images of new Ryan Field released: See photos
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. — Northwestern University and the family that's supported the majority of the funding and planning for the new Ryan Field are billing it as a "sports and entertainment venue set to become a landmark for college football and Chicago." Now, the public can get its first look.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Report: Kris Byrant's Lamborghini Huracan stolen from Colorado home
item.description: Kris Bryant's Lamborghini Huracan was stolen by a multi-state vehicle theft ring, but was recovered by police in Las Vegas after they traced the stolen vehicle to a home in the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
